text: As I enter this brightly lit, modern space, I feel an initial sense of curiosity—a threshold between the familiar and the innovative. The glass doors and sharp lines remind me of barriers and transparency, sparking thoughts about what is revealed and what is concealed in spaces devoted to knowledge and creation. The invitation to pass through and explore the world of research and development fills me with anticipation and a quiet wonder at human ingenuity. In this place, the future feels palpable.
